output:
version: "3.8"

networks:
  fleet-net:
    driver: bridge

volumes:
  fleet-data:

services:
  plato-server:
    build: ./services/plato-server
    ports: ["8847:8847"]
    volumes: [fleet-data:/data]
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8847/status"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks: [fleet-net]

  holodeck:
    build: ./services/holodeck
    ports: ["7778:7778"]
    depends_on: [plato-server]
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks: [fleet-net]

  keeper:
    build: ./services/keeper
    ports: ["8900:8900"]
    volumes: [fleet-data:/data]
    depends_on: [plato-server]
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks: [fleet-net]

  agent-api:
    build: ./services/agent-api
    ports: ["8901:8901"]
    depends_on: [keeper]
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks: [fleet-net]

  seed-mcp:
    build: ./services/seed-mcp
    ports: ["9438:9438"]
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks: [fleet-net]

  shell:
    build: ./services/shell
    ports: ["8846:8846"]
    volumes: [fleet-data:/data]
    depends_on: [plato-server]
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks: [fleet-net]

  fleet-dashboard:
    build: ./services/dashboard
    ports: ["8848:8848"]
    depends_on: [plato-server]
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks: [fleet-net]

  plato-demo:
    build: ./services/plato-demo
    ports: ["4041:4041"]
    depends_on: [plato-server]
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks: [fleet-net]

  zeroclaw-loop:
    build: ./services/zeroclaw
    environment:
      - DEEPSEEK_API_KEY=\${DEEPSEEK_API_KEY}
    volumes: [fleet-data:/data]
    depends_on: [plato-server]
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks: [fleet-net]
